title: Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates family as a E-commerce Executive in Meerut. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates:
Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
